item.title: Jimmy Kimmel: "What a day." – Kimmel found himself defending Americans' right to free speech on Monday, after a joke he made several days previous, prompted calls from the White House for ABC to fire him – again.

21

23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Asher Lax **No Creator Spotlight tonight, everything in my feed is people I've featured a lot recently. Tag me if you spot something fantastic.
“We live in a world changing so rapidly that what we mean frequently by common sense is doing the thing that would have been right last year.” - Edwin H. Land So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: They are all anti-semites, right? Right? THEY ARE KHAMAAAAS
item.description: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2020/feb/27/school-board-east-ramapo-public-school-funding-private-yeshivas A guy who committed deed theft on Black and Spanish homeowners didn't see a single criminal charge until 50 fucking lawsuits, finally sees trial. However, when the date came, it got rescheduled. Reason? He had a religious holiday! NOT A JOKE. https://imgur.com/gallery/3911Dq6 FP Edit: I want to highlight something for everyone... This isn't about Judaism or Jewish folks. This is about Zionism, Supremacism and Capitalism. Zionists have spent decades in building this narrative of Zionism = Judaism. This is grossly false! This done so that they can hide their atrocities behind the Jewish suffering. I urge the Jewish community to ostracize this vile, monstrous, ideology spreading across the world. People deserve to live in peace. People deserve to reap the benefits of their hard-work. People have the right to live, learn, work, build, eat, drink, and be free. All of us! No one gets to decide who is "us" and who is not.

item.title: Oh, That Socialism Over Reach ... Zohran Mamdani Calls It “Unacceptable” - a NYPD Officer Keeps Driving with 547 Violations
item.description: In New York City, where automated cameras now issue millions of tickets each year, one case has come to symbolize the limits of enforcement and the fragility of public trust. Officer James Giovansanti, a member of the NYPD, has amassed a driving record so extreme that it reads like a chronicle of disregard for the law, not just infractions. Since 2022, his 4,800‑pound pickup truck has been flagged by speed and red‑light cameras 547 times, averaging nearly one violation every other day in 2025 alone. The fines tied to those tickets exceed $36,000, yet Giovansanti remains on active duty, still behind the wheel, shielded by a system that penalizes vehicle owners financially but fails to trigger license points or suspensions under current state law. A Political Accountability Gap The revelations, first reported by Streetsblog New York City, have ignited a storm of criticism. Current NYC mayor Zohran Mamdani, a vocal advocate for traffic safety, condemned the behavior as “unacceptable” and stressed that city employees must model safe conduct. Beyond One Rogue Officer The stakes extend beyond one officer or one department: they touch on whether automated enforcement can truly deliver safety in a city where traffic violence remains a leading cause of injury and death. If the system cannot compel compliance from those sworn to uphold the law, critics ask, how can it be trusted to protect everyone else? Meanwhile, Giovansanti continues to drive, his record growing more notorious by the day. The case has become a rallying point for reformers, a headache for police leadership, and a reminder that technology alone cannot substitute for accountability. https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/zohran-mamdani-calls-unacceptable-york-201050547.html
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: When "Pick Me" Goes Wrong
item.description: New Youtube Video up at 7:30am PST and no, it isn’t a callout or drama video. It’s me opening up about something complicated and honestly kind of painful to watch (as this clip can attest)… So come live chat with me this morning IF YOU DARE https://youtu.be/Kpube_ZPwto

Old but gold
True story. And I work in legacy IT so the bar is fairly high.
Ok but those are all hot / impressive things. Fight me. But also please don’t cause I’m old.
You know who we’re talking about here
Apparently imgur isn’t available in England. Learned that the hard way.
So so tasty.
Daniel Sloss. Love that man.
What the what???
Loved this series. Not sure why I saved this tho. Oh well. Check it out.
Something posted by a friend who was lightly trolling. But……rumpnissar (the butt gnomes) are treasured.
